title: Diagnose missing live Polymarket mark ingress in Stage 1 runtime path
objective: Identify the exact runtime cause preventing live Polymarket marks from entering the Stage 1 state hub/SSE path without widening scope or falsely marking Stage 1 complete.
acceptance_criteria: exact cause of missing live mark ingress identified
if tiny code fix is needed, name it precisely
if no code fix is needed, name the runtime cause precisely
final result is VERIFIED_CAUSE_FOUND, PARTIAL, or BLOCKED
rollback: Diagnostic only unless a real tiny fix is separately requested.
